overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path illuminated by moonlight, passing from a mountain vista into denser woodland where the full moon becomes visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with snow-capped mountain backdrop

events.description: wooden fence structure comes into view on the right side of the path
moonlight begins to filter through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the distant snow-capped mountain

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak visible through the forest canopy
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and rocks
clusters of yellow flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail with a prominent snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. The character walks steadily forward along the dirt path, passing yellow wildflowers and approaching a wooden fence structure on the right. The lighting is dim with the moon beginning to appear through the trees toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: moonlit forest trail with reflective wet ground

events.description: full moon becomes clearly visible through the trees, illuminating the scene with blue-white light
ground surface becomes wet and reflective, showing puddles and damp earth
character looks upward at the moon while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through denser forest section while glancing up at the full moon

entered.detail: large bright full moon visible through the tree canopy
leafless dead trees with gnarled branches silhouetted against the sky
moist earth reflecting the moonlight with visible puddles

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses deeper into the forest, the full moon becomes prominently visible through the trees, casting a cool blue light across the scene. The ground transitions to wet, reflective earth. The character glances upward at the moon around the 44-second mark while continuing along the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with moon behind sparse trees

events.description: moon moves behind tree branches becoming partially occluded, reducing direct illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as moonlight filters through the branches

entered.detail: dark silhouette of distant treeline against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a more open area of the forest where the moon has moved behind the tree line to the right. The path remains wet and reflective, winding through a mix of dead leafless trees and evergreens as the moonlight becomes partially obscured by branches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a dark forest trail that transitions from a distant mountain vista into a moonlit woodland. It begins with the character walking steadily forward past yellow wildflowers and a wooden fence, with a snow-capped mountain looming in the distance under dim light. As the character progresses deeper into the forest, the full moon emerges prominently through the canopy, casting a cool blue glow over the ground as the dirt path shifts into wet, reflective earth. The scene then opens into a more sparse area of the woods where the character glances upward at the moon before it slides behind the tree line to the right. Finally, the camera follows the winding path through a mix of evergreens and dead, leafless trees as the moonlight becomes partially obscured by the overhead branches.
